title: docs: complete remaining function mappings
description:
Goal:
Continue mapping all remaining Unmapped entries in FunctionsTracking.csv until every function has inferred responsibility/evidence/confidence.

Definition of Done:
FunctionsTracking.csv has zero rows with Confidence = Unmapped. Use up to eight sub-agents at a time for unclear functions; bulk-map obvious CRT/runtime/library functions deterministically.

Notes:
Requested by user on 2026-05-20.
close_reason: Completed all function responsibility mappings in FunctionsTracking.csv

title: docs: infer unmapped function responsibilities
description:
Goal:
Use sub-agents to analyze unmapped functions in FunctionsTracking.csv and fill in inferred responsibilities, evidence, and confidence.

Definition of Done:
At least one batch of unmapped functions is analyzed and FunctionsTracking.csv is updated with inferred mappings. Continue in batches of at most eight active sub-agents.

Notes:
Requested by user on 2026-05-20. Keep CSV edits centralized in the main agent to avoid conflicts.
close_reason: Analyzed three sub-agent batches and updated FunctionsTracking.csv from 80 to 104 mapped functions.

title: docs: create function tracking csv
description:
Goal:
Create a CSV file listing every function from Decompiled/functions.tsv with columns Function, Inferred responsibility, Evidence, and Confidence.

Definition of Done:
CSV exists, includes all functions from the decompiled function index, and is seeded with known mapping details from FunctionsMapping.md where available.

Notes:
Requested by user on 2026-05-20.
close_reason: Created FunctionsTracking.csv with all 698 decompiled functions and seeded mapping details.

title: docs: map decompiled functions
description:
Goal:
Create a FunctionsMapping.md document for the decompiled LogicFriday source, starting from low-level system-call/import wrapper methods and working upward.

Definition of Done:
FunctionsMapping.md exists and documents identified methods, evidence, and confidence from Decompiled source.

Notes:
Requested by user on 2026-05-20.
close_reason: Created FunctionsMapping.md with first-pass decompiled function mapping.
